creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #1)

Ah, thanks. 

Random pick, one of the reports for which there's a thread in the archive: <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=272965>. 

Is the archive strictly representative of reports where, for example, 
'freebsd-bugs (Nobody) <bugs@freebsd.org>' 
is typically the _assignee_ 
and/or less typically a _CC_ at the time of activity?
